---
title: "examine_TPM_variability_and_LoD_Qonly"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)

# 1. Find and parse all quant files
files <- list.files(".", pattern = "\\.LRAA\\.quant\\.expr$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)

files
```


```{r}
# Extract metadata from path
meta_from_path <- function(path) {
  # Example: ./BT474/CL_BT474_E1_human/raw_prog_results/CL_BT474_E1_human.LRAA.quant.expr
  cell_line <- str_match(path, "^\\.?/?([^/]+)/")[,2]  # base directory name (BT474, K562, etc.)
  replicate <- str_match(basename(path), "_(E[0-9])_")[,2]
  data.frame(cell_line, replicate, path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

meta_df <- bind_rows(lapply(files, meta_from_path))

# 2. Read trimmed expression data
read_expr <- function(meta) {
  df <- read_tsv(meta$path, col_types = cols_only(
    gene_id = col_character(),
    splice_hash_code = col_character(),
    TPM = col_double()
  ))  %>% filter(! grepl(":iso-", splice_hash_code)) %>% #no single exons here
      dplyr::rename(transcript_id = splice_hash_code)
  
  df$cell_line <- meta$cell_line
  df$replicate <- meta$replicate
  df
}

expr_df <- bind_rows(lapply(split(meta_df, seq_len(nrow(meta_df))), read_expr))

# collapse identical splices
expr_df = expr_df %>% select(-gene_id) %>%
  group_by(transcript_id, cell_line, replicate)  %>%
  filter(TPM > 0) %>%
  mutate(TPM = sum(TPM)) %>% ungroup() %>% unique()


```


```{r}

# 3. Summarize reproducibility per transcript across replicates
repro_df <- expr_df %>%
  group_by(cell_line, transcript_id) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_TPM = mean(TPM, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_detected = sum(TPM > 0),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(detection_class = case_when(
    n_detected == 3 ~ "3/3 replicates",
    n_detected == 2 ~ "2/3 replicates",
    n_detected == 1 ~ "1/3 replicates",
    TRUE ~ "0/3"
  ))


library(forcats)

# 4. Bin and clean up


low_bin = -1.4
high_bin = 3.4
repro_df <- repro_df %>%
  mutate(log10_TPM = log10(mean_TPM + 1e-3)) %>%
  mutate(log10_TPM = ifelse(log10_TPM < low_bin, low_bin, log10_TPM)) %>%
  mutate(log10_TPM = ifelse(log10_TPM > high_bin, high_bin, log10_TPM)) %>%
   mutate(TPM_bin = cut(log10_TPM, breaks = seq(low_bin, high_bin, by = 0.2), include.lowest = TRUE))


# 5. Compute proportions
prop_df <- repro_df %>%
  group_by(cell_line, TPM_bin, detection_class) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(cell_line, TPM_bin) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 6. Extract TPM values from bin boundaries for pretty axis labels
bin_starts <- as.numeric(sub("\\(([^,]+),.*", "\\1", levels(repro_df$TPM_bin)))
tpm_labels <- signif(10^bin_starts, 2)
tpm_labels[1] <- "-inf"  # mark the first (lowest) bin as open-ended
tpm_labels[length(tpm_labels)] = "+inf"


# 7. Plot reproducibility curve with TPM axis labels
p <- ggplot(prop_df, aes(x = TPM_bin, y = prop, fill = detection_class)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", na.rm = TRUE, show.legend = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~ cell_line, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "1/3 replicates" = "red",
    "2/3 replicates" = "gold",
    "3/3 replicates" = "forestgreen"
  )) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = tpm_labels, drop = TRUE) +  # <— key fix
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Isoform De novo ID Reproducibility vs Expression (TPM)",
    x = "Mean TPM (binned, log-spaced)",
    y = "Proportion of isoforms",
    fill = "Detection"
  )

print(p)

```
